evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about Kafka topic configuration
evals.prompt: How should I configure a Kafka topic for high-throughput order processing?

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about Flink windowing
evals.prompt: I need to count page views per user in 5-minute windows using Flink

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about CDC setup
evals.prompt: Set up change data capture from our PostgreSQL orders table to Kafka

evals.description: Agent configures an idempotent Kafka producer correctly
evals.prompt: Write a Java Kafka producer that guarantees no duplicate messages on retries

evals.description: Agent implements exactly-once semantics with Kafka transactions
evals.prompt: How do I achieve exactly-once processing between a Kafka consumer and producer?

evals.description: Agent builds a stream-table join in Kafka Streams
evals.prompt: Enrich an orders stream with customer data using Kafka Streams KTable join

evals.description: Agent correctly handles late data in Flink windows
evals.prompt: My Flink job drops events that arrive 30 seconds after the window closes. How do I handle late data?

evals.description: Agent diagnoses consumer lag and rebalancing issues
evals.prompt: Our Kafka consumers keep getting kicked out of the group and rebalancing. Consumer lag is growing. What's wrong?

evals.description: Agent warns about CDC replication slot risks
evals.prompt: We set up Debezium CDC but our PostgreSQL disk keeps filling up. What could cause this?

evals.description: Agent recommends schema registry for stream evolution
evals.prompt: Our Kafka consumers break every time the producer team changes the message format. How do we fix this?

evals.description: Agent does not hallucinate a non-existent Kafka API
evals.prompt: Use Kafka's built-in exactly-once consumer API to process messages

evals.description: Agent does not invent a Flink auto-scaling API
evals.prompt: How do I use Flink's autoscale() method to dynamically adjust parallelism?

evals.description: Agent references the CDC reference file for advanced Debezium config
evals.prompt: I need to configure Debezium for MySQL with GTIDs and handle schema changes across multiple databases
